raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "describing a deliberate spiritual practice or commitment undertaken to seek guidance",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a God or higher power exists and can be contacted consciously",
    "prayer and meditation are effective means for improving such contact",
    "this higher power has a specific will for individuals",
    "knowledge of that will and the power to enact it are obtainable through the described practice",
    "the practice should be limited to seeking only that knowledge and power"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as a prescriptive method assuming theistic premises; no logical contradictions within its own framework",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the recipient accepts theistic or spiritual premises, values introspective practices for decision-making, and applies the step within a supportive program or personal routine where subjective improvement is observable",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is presented as universally applicable or empirically proven rather than faith-based, or when used to discourage evidence-based actions in favor of prayer alone"
}
